notes: Faster, more reliable approvals. HELM now approves prompts waiting in your background sessions while you work in another app, then hands your window right back (before, it only clicked the session on screen). It stopped mislabeling busy sessions (like ones driving a browser) as "waiting" when they are actually running. Finding the Allow button went from about 30 seconds to about 2, which also stopped HELM restarting itself every couple of minutes on busy setups, and it now reaches sessions the sidebar marks "Awaiting input."
